title: hieracium perasperum
intro: Hieracium perasperum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, commonly known as a hawkweed. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium perasperum include reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as acting as a natural remedy for wounds and minor injuries. Hieracium perasperum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
